title: fix: replace README images with brand-consistent nanobanana-2 generations
author: ElliotEtag

gist.headline: Sprucing up the front porch
gist.blurb: We gave our README a cozy makeover with brand-new, 8-bit pixel art generated by our own nanobanana-2 model. Polly the bee has never looked better!
gist.summary: Updated the main repository README with brand-consistent, nanobanana-2 generated pixel art images hosted on our own media infrastructure.
gist.impact: Visitors to the repository will now see a cohesive, cozy 8-bit aesthetic that perfectly matches the pollinations.ai brand identity.
gist.visual_concept: The PR is about updating the README images to match the brand identity (cozy 8-bit pixel art, Polly the bee, lime green). The visual should depict Polly the bee painting or hanging up new pixel art pictures in a cozy gallery or on a giant README document.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny painter's beret, hanging up glowing new pixel art pictures on a giant digital document. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
